name: Phase 1: Sync tasks when requirements change
description: When any Phase 1 requirements.md spec file is saved, remind the agent to check if tasks.md and steering files need updating.

action.message:
A Phase 1 requirements.md file was just saved. Please review the changes and check:

1. Does the corresponding tasks.md file need new tasks to implement the updated requirements?
2. Do any steering files (.kiro/steering/phase1-*.md) need updating to reflect the new rules or patterns?
3. Are there any other specs that reference the changed requirements (e.g. phase1-error-handling references phase1-deepracer-tools patterns)?
4. If new actions were added to requirements, do ALL of these need updating?
   - phase1-plan-json-schema/requirements.md (REQ-SCHEMA-3 action table)
   - phase1-planner-agent/requirements.md (REQ-PLAN-2 and REQ-PLAN-4)
   - phase1-deepracer-tools/tasks.md
   - phase1-deepracer-tools/requirements.md

Please identify and list any files that need updating.
